title: Mortgage Rates Spike Again While Pending Sales Drop And Inventory Levels Rise
text: Freddie Mac (OTCMKTS:FMCC) reported the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage averaged 6.70% as of Sept.

title: News Corp: Near 52-Week Low Again Despite Solid FY22
text: News Corp shares are again near their 52-week low and down 37% in the past year, with Class A shares trading at 12.5x FY22 EPS. Operational performance has continued to be solid, with Q4 providing a mostly strong finish to FY22, despite investor macro concerns.

title: News Corp. (NWSA) Down 10% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: News Corp. (NWSA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
